# cirro_process (Resource)

Manages a custom Cirro process (pipeline or ingest data type). Destroying archives the process.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example 1: NEXTFLOW process with pipeline code and custom settings
resource "cirro_process" "nextflow_pipeline" {
  id          = "my-nextflow-pipeline"
  name        = "My Nextflow Pipeline"
  description = "Runs quality control and alignment on sequencing data."
  executor    = "NEXTFLOW"

  # Projects that can run this process
  linked_project_ids = ["proj-abc123"]
  is_tenant_wide    = false

  # Processes that feed into this one (leave empty if none)
  parent_process_ids = []

  # Processes that can run after this one (leave empty if none)
  child_process_ids = []

  # Location of the Nextflow workflow code on GitHub
  pipeline_code {
    repository_path = "my-org/my-nextflow-workflow"
    version         = "main"
    repository_type = "GITHUB_PUBLIC"
    entry_point     = "main.nf"
  }

  # Location of the Cirro process definition (UI form, file manifest, etc.)
  custom_settings {
    repository      = "my-org/my-nextflow-workflow"
    branch          = "main"
    folder          = ".cirro"
    repository_type = "GITHUB_PUBLIC"
  }

  category          = "Quality Control"
  documentation_url = "https://github.com/my-org/my-nextflow-workflow"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `child_process_ids` (List of String) IDs of processes that can be run downstream of this one.
- `description` (String) Description of the process (4-500 characters).
- `executor` (String) How the workflow is executed: INGEST, NEXTFLOW, CROMWELL, or OMICS_READY2RUN.
- `id` (String) Unique process ID (lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, dashes; 4-80 chars). Cannot be changed after creation.
- `linked_project_ids` (List of String) IDs of projects that can run this process.
- `name` (String) Friendly name for the process (4-80 characters).
- `parent_process_ids` (List of String) IDs of processes that produce input for this one.

### Optional

- `allow_multiple_sources` (Boolean) Whether the process accepts multiple dataset sources.
- `category` (String) Category label shown in the UI (e.g. Microbial Analysis).
- `custom_settings` (Attributes) Location of the Cirro process definition in a GitHub repository. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_settings))
- `data_type` (String) Name of the data type this process produces.
- `documentation_url` (String) Link to process documentation.
- `file_requirements_message` (String) Description of the files to be uploaded (INGEST processes).
- `is_tenant_wide` (Boolean) Whether the process is shared across the entire tenant.
- `pipeline_code` (Attributes) Location of the workflow analysis code (not required for INGEST). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pipeline_code))
- `uses_sample_sheet` (Boolean) Whether the process uses the Cirro-provided sample sheet.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the process was created (ISO 8601).
- `is_archived` (Boolean) Whether the process has been archived.
- `owner` (String) Username of the process creator.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the process was last updated (ISO 8601).

<a id="nestedatt--custom_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_settings`

Required:

- `repository` (String) GitHub repository containing the process definition (org/repo).

Optional:

- `branch` (String) Branch, tag, or commit hash of the process definition.
- `folder` (String) Folder within the repo containing the process definition.
- `repository_type` (String) Repository type: NONE, AWS, GITHUB_PUBLIC, or GITHUB_PRIVATE.

Read-Only:

- `commit_hash` (String) Commit hash of the last successful sync.
- `last_sync` (String) Timestamp of the last successful sync from the repository.
- `sync_status` (String) Status of the last repository sync.


<a id="nestedatt--pipeline_code"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pipeline_code`

Required:

- `entry_point` (String) Main script for running the workflow (e.g. main.nf).
- `repository_path` (String) GitHub repository containing the workflow code (org/repo).
- `repository_type` (String) Repository type: NONE, AWS, GITHUB_PUBLIC, or GITHUB_PRIVATE.
- `version` (String) Branch, tag, or commit hash of the workflow code.

Optional:

- `executor_version` (String) Version of the executor.
